tags.label: GenerativeArtGallery — artwork1 (Flow Field Particles)
tags.description: Adapted from the 6-mode flow field particle system in GenerativeArtGallery. Particles follow a vector field derived from Perlin noise, vortex, gravity, wave, or chaos functions. Color mapped to flow angle or noise-sampled palette. Trail alpha creates ghost/painting effects. Resets particle positions on mode change.
